programmes.show_description: An unwed teen mother claims she was punched in the face by one of her ex's friends. A dog groomer sues for damages. S10, Ep216
A woman claims her stressful relationship with an older man caused her to get sick and she denies owing him anything. S10, Ep217
A woman accuses her estranged daughter-in law of wreaking havoc on their family when she up and leaves the state; Judge Judy asks her to do the right thing. S23, Ep181
An Idaho rodeo takes a walk on the wild side when young, intoxicated campers start punching the daylights out of each other. S23, Ep182
A man knocks on 80 apartment doors to try and find the partygoer who damaged his fiancé's car; the host of the rowdy party refuses to give up a friend. S23, Ep183
The official state cat of Maine is at the centre of a dispute between a tenant and landlord who argue over whether the animal was severely abused or not. S23, Ep184
An ugly fight breaks out when a man doesn't make hot chocolate fast enough for his lover; both are medically treated for bleach exposure. S23, Ep185
A restaurant owner is accused of making a profit by hiring disabled people and then not paying them. S23, Ep186
The world's unluckiest horse is struck by a car while allegedly being pursued by a large, wild carnivore. S23, Ep187
Angry mothers dispute underage drinking and the car accident that ensued after their teenagers got drunk at a party. S10, Ep211
A woman claims her cousin stole her identity and racked up a hefty phone bill. A teenager insists she owes nothing to her ex-roommate. S10, Ep212
Cutting-edge forensic science helps solve real crimes. Devon Guzman's murder was set up to look like suicide, but investigators uncover the shocking truth. S9, Ep16
A man disappears one year after starting an affair with his friend's wife. Fifteen years later, a hobbyist with a metal detector helps police find new evidence. S9, Ep17
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Two young lovers are ambushed by a gun wielding assailant in Beaufort County, South Carolina, before he disappears - leaving eighteen-year-old David Krulewicz dead. S2, Ep2
As a group of NCIS officers celebrate Christmas Eve, 1991 in California, a group of armed men storm the celebration, killing Corporal. Lindell Mitchell during the altercation. S2, Ep3
Before Rhonda and her boyfriend Stephen headed to the Columbia River Gorge, she joked to a friend that Nichols was either 'going to propose or kill me'. S30, Ep15
An outbreak of food poisoning led investigators to a religious cult that was determined to overthrow the government. S7, Ep8
Using clever investigative techniques, police uncover a series of bizarre events surrounding the death of a woman that was shot in the back. S7, Ep9
Investigators use a decapitated body and an artificial hip to track down the leader of the American Atheists group, who mysteriously disappeared. S7, Ep10
Investigators are stumped after receiving reports that a man was run over by a truck and the body went missing. S7, Ep11
On July 31st, 1995 Patricia 'Patti' Berry disappeared on her way home from work, a completely out of character occurrence that would spark a sinister 19 year long mystery. S2, Ep4
In October 1988, Patricia Ann Jacob's body was discovered on the bank of the Neches River in Austin, Texas. The Texas Rangers were just beginning a 34-year pursuit of justice. S2, Ep5
A man suspected in his girlfriend's murder swears he didn't do it - can his Fitbit prove he's innocent? S30, Ep16
A hunter is shot three times and killed. Analysis of the bullets leads the police to look closer to home and believe the 'accident' is actually murder. S9, Ep20
In 1984, a flurry of arson fires in California have the authorities baffled, until the discovery of a fingerprint points to a most unlikely suspect. S9, Ep21
A small community in upstate New York is rocked by the death of a well-respected nurse in a car accident, but seed pods in her hair suggest something sinister. S9, Ep22
A woman's disappearance in Austin, Texas, is paired with another case under similar circumstances, and DNA profiling uncovers a prime suspect. S9, Ep23
A woman sues for vet bills after a handyman she hired for a bargain allegedly leaves sharp objects all over her backyard. S23, Ep188
A married couple go after a former tenant for allegedly damaging their rental home with their breeding business. S23, Ep189
A young woman's story changes so many times the Judge can barely keep up; a friend sues her after she allegedly sleeps with her boyfriend. S23, Ep190
After a woman allegedly attacks a friend with a pair of scissors, she countersues for alleged threats, slander and cyberbullying. S23, Ep191
When over $8,000 worth of appliances goes missing, a solid eye witness may seal the fate of a contractor in question. S23, Ep192
A marine fights off a pit bull by all means necessary when the animal attacks his dog; their neighbour claims he walked right past their 'Bad Ass Dog on Duty' sign. S23, Ep193
A man gives his paralegal permission to deduct a $700 filing fee from his business account only to discover months later that over $30K has gone missing. S23, Ep194
A woman denies beating up her boyfriend and sues for expenses due to an allegedly false arrest. A musician sues for damages after being hit in the head with a bottle. S10, Ep218
Charged with drug trafficking and assault, a young man denies owing the mother of his child for attorney fees. S10, Ep219
A filmmaker is accused of producing a substandard dance recital video. A teenager claims intoxicated friends destroyed her computer at a party. S10, Ep220
After an intense custody battle, a woman sues the father of her child for money she allegedly spent remodelling his home. S10, Ep221
A repossessed vehicle leaves bitter ex-lovers disputing the whereabouts of car payment money. S10, Ep222
An angry mother calls the police when her daycare provider allegedly refuses to change her child's dirty diaper. S10, Ep223
Teenagers run from the scene after illegally driving and wrecking their parent's car. A woman sues her teenage fiance for unpaid rent. S10, Ep224

Top-notch forensic science helps solve real crimes. Insects found on a decomposing body are used to track down a twisted killer who stuffed Edna Posey into a box to leave her to rot. S7, Ep12
A teenage girl uses her own knowledge of forensics to help police track down her abductor. S7, Ep13
Investigators have the gruesome task of identifying the owner of a severed leg found in a rubbish bin. S7, Ep14
Top-notch forensic science helps solve crimes. A post-mortem on a badly burned body reveals he was stabbed 24 times. Police suspect that more than one criminal might be responsible. S7, Ep15
In January 1989, Mary Hague-Kelly was discovered raped and strangled to death in her home in Texas. In the wake of her murder, it seemed a monster may live close by. S2, Ep6
A study in modern crime solving techniques. It demonstrates how traditional investigative techniques can now be significantly enhanced by the scientific power of DNA profiling.
A woman suddenly vanishes and is not reported missing for months - her hairdresser pushes for answers - is she dead or alive? S30, Ep18
A frozen body wrapped in sheets is found near Anchorage, Alaska, by hikers and a salvaged fingerprint and a tuft of red carpet quickly uncover the killer. S9, Ep24
Nancy Ludwig is found stabbed to death in her hotel room in Detroit. Her death is similar to another woman, Margaret Eby, who was murdered five years earlier. S9, Ep25
A tragedy on a shrimp boat during a storm sees the captain drown. The deckhand lives to tell the tale, but his version of the truth is called into question. S9, Ep26
When a wealthy tycoon is killed, his will stipulates what to do in the event of him being killed under violent circumstances. Why was he so prepared? S9, Ep27
A golf cart driver in a senior gated community claims a motorist blew a stop sign and caused a wreck; she says he was the one driving recklessly. S23, Ep195
A man claims his ex-lover threatened and harassed him; his car was allegedly damaged in an attempt to escape gunfire. S23, Ep196
A man's new rental property is burned to the ground in a California forest fire; he is sued by his previous landlord for eviction fees. S23, Ep197
A widower claims he started a cleaning business with his girlfriend but that she allegedly neglected to pay him. S23, Ep198
A new tenant allegedly disturbs the peace when his move-in time is adjusted; the Judge tells the landlord to 'kiss the carpet that he didn't move in!' S23, Ep199
A man sues his former business partner for the return of two Mercedes and claims he was conned in an out-of-state deal. S23, Ep200
A disgruntled employee sneaks into a store to steal clothing off the rack from her former boss who allegedly owes her money. S23, Ep201
An angry student claims a co-worker repaid a loan with a bad cheque. Ex-roommates clash over a stolen Playstation, damaged walls and unpaid rent. S10, Ep225
Charges of disorderly conduct in a club land ex-lovers in jail and fighting over payment of bail. Family drama escalates when sisters become co-workers. S10, Ep226
A retired teacher accuses neighbourhood children of poisoning and killing his pet fish. S10, Ep227
A married couple deny owing their ex-roommate for property and the loss of a dog when his behaviour around their child is called into question. S10, Ep228
A woman sues for emotional distress after claiming she walked in on strangers having sex in her new home. S10, Ep229
